dct_title_s: The theatre of the empire of Great Britaine : presenting an exact geography of the kingdomes of England, Scotland, Ireland, and the iles adioyning : with the shires, hundreds, cities and shire-townes, within ye kingdome of England, divided and described
dct_description_sm: Title page from 1627 edition reused. The imprint on title pages of Books 2-4 is: London, printed by John Legatt, for William Humble, 1646.
Some maps signed by engraver Jodocus Hondius.

The theatre of the empire of Great Britaine -- The second booke containing the principality of Wales -- The third booke containing a generall view of the Kingdome of Scotland -- The fourth booke containing the Kingdome of Ireland.

Map 1. Britain -- Map 2. Kingdome of Great Britaine and Ireland -- Map 3. Kingdome of England -- Map 4. Kent -- Map 5. Sussex -- Map 6. Surrey -- Map 7. Hantshire -- Map 8. Wight Island -- Map 9. Dorsetshyre -- Map 10. Devonshire -- Map 11. Cornwall -- Map 12. Somersetshire -- Map 13. Wilshire -- Map 14. Barkshire -- Map 15. Middle-Sex -- Map 16. Essex -- Map 17. Suffolke -- Map 18. Norfolk -- Map 19. Cambridgshire -- Map 20. Hartfordshire -- Map 21. Bedford Shire -- Map 22. Buckingham -- Map 23. Oxfordshire -- Map 24. Glocestershire -- Map 25. Herefordshire -- Map 26. Worcester -- Map 27. Counti of Warwick -- Map 28. Northamptonshire -- Map 29. Huntington -- Map 30. Rutlandshire -- Map 31. Leicester -- Map 32. Countie and Citie of Lyncolne -- Map 33. Countie of Nottingham -- Map 34. Darbieshire -- Map 35. Stafford -- Map 36. Shropshyre -- Map 37. Countye Palatine of Chester -- Map 38. Countie Pallatine of Lancaster -- Map 39. York Shire -- Map 40. West Ridinge of Yorkeshyre -- Map 41. North and East Ridins of Yorkshire -- Map 42. Bishoprick and Citie of Durham -- Map 43. Countie Westmorland -- Map 44. Cumberland -- Map 45. Northumberland -- Map 46. The Isle of Man -- Map 47. [Holy Iland; Earne] -- Map 48. [Garnsey; Iarsey] -- Map 49. Wales -- Map 50. Penbrokshyre -- Map 51. Caermarden -- Map 52. Glamorgan Shyre -- Map 53. Countye of Monmouth -- Map 54. Breknoke -- Map 55. Countie of Radnor -- Map 56. Cardigan Shyre -- Map 57. Montgomery Shire -- Map 58. Merioneth Shire -- Map 59. Denbigh Shire -- Map 60. Flint-Shire -- Map 61. Caernarvon -- Map 62. Anglesey -- Map 63. Kingdome of Scotland -- Map 64. Kingdome of Irland -- Map 65. The Province of Mounster -- Map 66. Countie of Leinster -- Map 67. The Province of Connaugh -- Map 68. The Province Ulster
dct_publisher_sm: And are to be sold by George Humble at the Whit horse in Popes-head Alley
